title: DIVCHI 2-Pack Serving Tray Set – Non-Slip Lap Boards with Grip Handles, Ideal for Food Prep, Tea, Breakfast in Bed – Plastic Tray for Stable Dining Dishwasher Safe (Black,gray,white)
features: Oops how much hassle is it when you’re carrying a round of coffees and they go skating from one end of the tea trays with handles to the other.
White,grey & black color available but random 2 dinner trays will be shipped.
Made from thick plastic, this food tray has an anti-slip underside too, making it ideal as a dinner tray to rest on your lap.
Breakfast tray is comfortable, practical and colourful; look out for matching Colour works items or mix colours to make a fun collection.
The kitchen tray measures 40.5 x 28.5 cm (16 x 11 Inch); it's dishwasher safe; colour may vary to that shown
description: Product Description Divchi Presents Non Slip Serving Tray's with Gripping Nubs On Front & Back STURDY NON SKID SERVING TRAYS: The non-stick dots on the surface are ideal for transporting your plates or glass without sliding off. Moreover, the bottom has a waved grippy feature, which can ensure trays stay on the table or lap without sliding around. MULTIPLE PURPOSE MULTIPLE PURPOSE: It is perfect for a snack or cup of coffee working as a bed tray for eating, Nice for enjoying football match to be tv trays, to Keep in the car for tailgating while traveling, to have picnics and carry dinner to the porch, to celebrate activities at outdoor patio, etc. IDEAL DESIGN IDEAL DESIGN: The size is manageable large enough room for a salad plate, silverware and tea on it, looking as a modern rectangular style meal tray with hand size fit, it is easy to hand on hook and stackable for storage in your kitchen. It doesn’t stain and easy to clean Multi coloured Option Grey & White Non-Slip Serving Tray with Handles Set Of 2 PACKAGE INCLUDES: 2 pack serving tray, which can meet different needs, serve for all occasions. Our serving tray is easy to clean, just scrub with a damp cloth or put them into dishwasher. MULTIPLE PURPOSE: This tray can be widely serving in any Occasions, Having a great breakfast in the morning, Taking food out to the picnic, reserving snacks in front of a TV football match. trays are stackable, you may buy more pieces if you have an upcoming party or event High Built Quality & Award Winning Design Triple Grip GRIP & HOLD: This is a modern looking tray With rubber on strong plastic, it has grips on both the underside & Handles.
